metadata.description: CAR-300 robots clear, compact, and level designated construction pad for future habitat modules.
metadata.intended_usage: Reference in mission profiles for site preparation after robot activation.
metadata.author: AI Copilot

tasks.name: Construction Pad Leveling
tasks.description: CAR-300 robots conduct site prep work: clear debris, compact regolith, and level terrain for future habitat module foundation. Marks construction zone as leveled in settlement operational data.
